zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Burnell於1347年出生在英國史洛普爾霍爾蓋特時，他的父親Nicholas Burnell22歲，母親Mary Joan Walcoate20歲。他於1370年之前與Elizabeth結婚。他於1406年被列為 knight of the garter。他去世於1420年11月27日在英國享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Burnell于1347年出生在英国史洛普爾霍爾蓋特时，他的父亲Nicholas Burnell22岁，母亲Mary Joan Walcoate20岁。他于1370年之前与Elizabeth结婚。他于1406年被列为 knight of the garter。他去世于1420年11月27日在英国享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Burnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Burnel, a metathesized form of Old French Brunel, originally a nickname for someone with brown hair or complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Burnell was born in 1347, in Holdgate, Shropshire, England, his father, Nicholas Burnell, was 22 and his mother, Mary Joan Walcoate, was 20. He married Elizabeth before 1370. In 1406, at the age of 59, his occupation is listed as  knight of the garter. He died on 27 November 1420, in England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Burnell est né en 1347, à Holdgate, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Burnell, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mary Joan Walcoate, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth avant 1370. En 1406, à l’âge de 59 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est  knight of the garter. Il est décédé le 27 novembre 1420, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Burnell 1347 in Holdgate, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Burnell 22 und seine Mutter Mary Joan Walcoate 20. Er hat vor 1370 Elizabeth geheiratet. 1406, als er 59 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als  knight of the garter aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. November 1420 im Alter von 73 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Burnell è nato il nel 1347 nel Holdgate, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Burnell, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Mary Joan Walcoate, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth prima del 1370. Nel 1406, all'età di 59 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come  knight of the garter. Morì il 27 novembre 1420, nel England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Burnellが1347年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアホールドガトで生まれた時，父Nicholas Burnellは22歳，母Mary Joan Walcoateは20歳であった。1370年以前にElizabethと結婚した。1406年，59歳の時，職業は knight of the garterと記録されている。彼は1420年11月27日にイギリスで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Burnell(이)가 1347년 영국 슈럽실르 홀드가트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Burnell(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Joan Walcoate(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1370년 이전 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 1406년, 59세의 나이로 그의 직업은  knight of the garter이었다. 그는 1420년 11월 27일 영국에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Burnell nasceu em 1347, em Holdgate, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Burnell, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mary Joan Walcoate, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth antes 1370. Em 1406, com 59 anos, sua profissão aparece como  knight of the garter. Ele faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1420, em Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Burnell родился в 1347 г. в местности холджэит, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Burnell было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Joan Walcoate, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth перед 1370 г. В 1406 году, в возрасте 59 лет,  он работал по профессии  knight of the garter. Он умер 27 ноября 1420 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Burnell nació en 1347, en Holdgate, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Burnell, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mary Joan Walcoate, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth antes de 1370. En 1406, a la edad de 59 años, su ocupación registrada era  knight of the garter. Murió el 27 de noviembre de 1420, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
